changes.detail: All five required fields present and correct. work_id: MED-FRAME-2_medical_frame_identity_index. branch: work/MED-FRAME-2-medical-frame-identity-index. risk_level: HIGH. execution_model: TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. change_type: MIXED. CONFIRMED: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 2–6.

HIGH correct. Sprint creates governed identity infrastructure that future runtime promotion work will depend on, and it classifies collision state for active packages. MIXED change_type requires BEHAVIOUR controls. HIGH requires Claude audit + GPT architectural review + dual approval before merge. CONFIRMED: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 96–105.

TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH correct. Docs-Only Bypass (SOP §11) does NOT apply: artefacts include knowledge_bus/governance/, knowledge_bus/schema/, backend/scripts/, and backend/tests/ — all outside /docs/. Bus is required. CONFIRMED: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 150–159.

All 15 required source paths verified present in repo. (1) docs/architecture/MED-FRAME-1_signal_family_contextual_frame_architecture.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS, content read: non-runtime architecture sprint, defines signal families, frames, activation_key format, creatinine worked example. (2) knowledge_bus/governance/medical_frame_identity_model_draft_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED EXISTS, content read: 3-frame creatinine draft, schema_version 0.1.0-draft. (3) docs/sprints/launch_core_carry_forward_register.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS, content read: CF-MEDFRAME1-001/002/003 all Open. (4) docs/governance/KNOWLEDGE_BUS_SOP_v1.3.1.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (5) docs/governance/KNOWLEDGE_BUS_PASS3_PROMOTION_PROTOCOL_v1.1.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (6) docs/audit-papers/KB-UTIL-2-PROMOTE-WIRE-1_creatinine_runtime_authority_switch_report.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (7) docs/audit-papers/KB-UTIL-2-ACTIVATION-READINESS_creatinine_candidate_divergence_and_collision_resolution_report.md — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (8) knowledge_bus/governance/pass3_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (9) knowledge_bus/governance/pass3_legacy_package_mapping_plan_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (10) knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS: package_manifest.yaml, research_brief.yaml, signal_library.yaml. (11) knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS: package_manifest.yaml, research_brief.yaml, signal_library.yaml. (12) knowledge_bus/generated_pilot/kb_util_2_pilot/promoted_candidates/pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS: 5 files including compile_manifest.yaml and promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml. (13) backend/scripts/validate_day_one_architecture.py — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (14) backend/tests/architecture/test_day_one_architecture_guardrails.py — CONFIRMED EXISTS. (15) backend/core/knowledge/signal_activation_identity_v1.py — CONFIRMED EXISTS, content read.

Activation keys traced through backend/core/knowledge/signal_activation_identity_v1.py content. activation_key format = '{signal_id}::{source_spec_id}' (line 28). (A) pkg_kb52c: source_document = 'knowledge_bus/research/investigation_specs/multi_llm_research/Batch_4_Pass_3.json' (package_manifest.yaml line 9) — not an inv_*.yaml path, so infer_source_spec_id falls to _PKG_BODY_RE match on 'pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration' → body = 'creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration' → source_spec_id = 'inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration'. CONFIRMED: signal_activation_identity_v1.py line 48. activation_key = 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration'. (B) pkg_s24: source_document = 'knowledge_bus/research/investigation_specs/inv_creatinine_high_renal_v1.yaml' (package_manifest.yaml line 8) — matches /inv_ + .yaml pattern, stem = 'inv_creatinine_high_renal_v1', after _v1 stripping → source_spec_id = 'inv_creatinine_high_renal'. CONFIRMED: signal_activation_identity_v1.py line 45. activation_key = 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_renal'. (C) pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1: explicit source_spec_id = 'inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration' (package_manifest.yaml line 13). activation_key = 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration'. COLLISION WITH pkg_kb52c CONFIRMED — identical activation_key. Must be modeled as compiled_not_promoted with collision_status: allowed_non_runtime_collision.

All 5 output artefact directories exist. knowledge_bus/governance/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS (medical_frame_identity_model_draft_v1.yaml already present). knowledge_bus/schema/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS (13 existing schema files). backend/scripts/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS. backend/tests/regression/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS with __init__.py. docs/audit-papers/ — CONFIRMED EXISTS. No directory creation required.

Carry-forward register read in full (docs/sprints/launch_core_carry_forward_register.md). CF-MEDFRAME1-001 status: Open (line 52) — must be marked Resolved when sprint success criteria are all met. CF-MEDFRAME1-002 status: Open (line 53) — must remain Open (CONTEXT-MOD-1 scope). CF-MEDFRAME1-003 status: Open (line 54) — must remain Open (creatinine adjudication deferred). No other carry-forwards are affected by this sprint.

Sprint is MIXED but explicitly non-runtime. Index must be marked runtime_consumed: false / status: governed_non_runtime_index. Validator must not be a runtime dependency. Prohibited files list (automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 307–320): SignalEvaluator, SignalRegistry, runtime loaders, domain_score_assembler, report_compiler, frontend, SSOT, scoring thresholds, unit conversion, knowledge_bus/current/latest_knowledge_status.json, knowledge_bus/packages/*/signal_library.yaml, knowledge_bus/packages/*/package_manifest.yaml, knowledge_bus/packages/*/research_brief.yaml. No output drift is possible from this sprint. MIXED classification is correct because the governed index will be consumed by future runtime promotion sprints.

The validator (backend/scripts/validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py) must NOT import from or depend on any runtime pipeline module: no SignalEvaluator, no SignalRegistry, no pipeline imports. It must be a standalone YAML loader + schema validation script. Cursor must confirm this at Stage 4A closure. If any runtime import appears necessary, STOP condition #5 in the prompt applies: 'STOP if validator would require runtime imports'. CONFIRMED: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 264.

8 regression test targets fully specified in prompt (lines 279–287). All 8 map directly to validator rule logic: (1) valid creatinine frame index passes, (2) duplicate active activation_key fails, (3) classified non-runtime compiled_not_promoted collision passes, (4) missing required field fails, (5) unknown promotion_state fails, (6) unknown collision_status fails, (7) runtime_consumed must be false, (8) referenced package paths exist or are explicitly deferred. Tests are self-contained against static YAML fixtures and do not require runtime state.

Out-of-scope list is comprehensive (automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 381–393): no creatinine adjudication, no package activation/retirement, no package content modification, no runtime loading, no SignalRegistry modification, no frontend, no questionnaire modifier rules, no medication modifier rules, no Layer B frame evaluation, no bulk indexing. Scope creep risk is LOW given explicit prohibitions and STOP conditions.

advisories.title: Draft YAML uses non-authorized promotion_state enum values — must not be carried forward
advisories.detail: knowledge_bus/governance/medical_frame_identity_model_draft_v1.yaml line 26 uses 'runtime_active_legacy'; line 32 uses 'runtime_active_legacy_pending_adjudication'. Neither value is in the sprint-defined authorized enum. Authorized enum (from prompt lines 227–234): runtime_active_canonical | runtime_active_legacy_unadjudicated | compiled_not_promoted | superseded | retired | deferred. Cursor must use 'runtime_active_canonical' for pkg_kb52c (current Pass_3 canonical authority for the reduced GFR frame) and 'runtime_active_legacy_unadjudicated' for pkg_s24 (pending clinical adjudication). Using the draft YAML values in the production index would cause the validator's enum check to fail and would be an architectural error.

advisories.title: Frame 3 (potassium acute complication context) has no distinct research spec — model as deferred
advisories.detail: pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal (signal_library.yaml line 8) covers only inv_creatinine_high_renal as its single spec. There is no separately compiled 'inv_creatinine_high_acute_electrolyte_risk' package in the current estate. The MED-FRAME-1 architecture paper (line 254) names this frame as 'frame_electrolyte_risk' with spec 'inv_creatinine_high_acute_electrolyte_risk' — a future target. Cursor must model Frame 3 as: promotion_state=deferred, runtime_authority_status=none, clinical_adjudication_status=required_before_activation, source_package_id=pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal (sub-context embedded in s24 without separate spec authority), provisional research_spec_id=inv_creatinine_high_acute_electrolyte_risk, collision_status=none. A notes field must explain it is currently bundled within s24 pending separate spec and adjudication. This correctly preserves the clinical context without asserting false runtime authority.

advisories.title: Collision representation for pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1 — use allowed_non_runtime_collision
advisories.detail: pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1 and pkg_kb52c share activation_key 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration'. This is the known collision from KB-UTIL-2-PROMOTE-WIRE-1. In the index: pkg_creatinine_high_renal_pass3_v1 must have promotion_state=compiled_not_promoted, runtime_authority_status=none, collision_status=allowed_non_runtime_collision, superseded_by=pkg_kb52c_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration. The collision_group_id field should link both entries. pkg_kb52c must have collision_status=allowed_non_runtime_collision (it is the active party in a known classified collision, not a free-standing authority with no collision history). Validator rule: duplicate active activation_key is blocked; compiled_not_promoted collision is allowed only when explicitly classified — this case satisfies that rule.

advisories.title: pkg_s24 has a DIFFERENT activation_key from pkg_kb52c — these are not collisions
advisories.detail: pkg_s24 activation_key = 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_renal' (distinct from pkg_kb52c's 'signal_creatinine_high::inv_creatinine_high_reduced_glomerular_filtration'). These two runtime-active packages govern different frames and do NOT collide. collision_status for both pkg_s24 and pkg_kb52c entries (excluding the pass3_v1 collision group) should be 'none'. Cursor must not incorrectly classify the s24 vs kb52c relationship as a collision — they represent medically distinct frames with distinct activation keys and are both legitimately runtime-active.
